programme.sub-title: Man's Best Ghost Friend and More

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.sub-title: The Body Box
programme.desc: An old hospital in South Pittsburg, Tenn., once a beacon of hope, now hoards spirits of the dead, including a dog-like entity called the Creeper.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: The Witches of Leigh
programme.desc: Ian performs exorcism to save a family in Essex; knowing it will take everything to save them, Jayne makes a desperate plea for help from the spirits of witches she believes used to inhabit the area.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: Crying Girl of Comber
programme.desc: The team investigates a farmhouse reportedly haunted by a child and another entity; pets have fallen ill; the team makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: The Man Behind the Curtain
programme.desc: An international team of paranormal investigators tries help families who believe their houses are haunted.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: Heartbreak House
programme.desc: On the verge of splitting up, Sonia and Baz need help as an oppressive force has been tormenting them ever since they extended their house; the team must work quickly to bring peace to the property and save the relationship.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Bungalow
programme.desc: An international team of paranormal investigators tries help families who believe their houses are haunted.

programme.title: Help! My House is Haunted
programme.sub-title: Nightmare Nursery
programme.desc: Nursery owner Nina thinks her building is haunted; children and staff have seen mysterious figures and staff are scared to go to certain parts of it on their own; the team must figure out what lurks inside and help bring calm back to Nina's nursery.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: The Black Monk
programme.desc: Richard and his team are reminded of a poltergeist haunting investigation in England; the Tolfs investigate a farmhouse in Indiana; a family asks Jack to get rid of an abusive spirit.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Killer Spirit
programme.desc: Investigators face an entity known as Big Black in Indiana; Richard encounters a ghost in a home where a double murder-suicide took place; Karlo investigates an old school building.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Haunted Asylum
programme.desc: Jay and Marie witness strange occurrences in their home after a cemetery investigation; the Tolfs investigate an old hospital in Michigan; Shannon and her team investigate a mansion in New York.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Taken Over
programme.desc: The Tolfs investigate the site of one of the earliest recorded possessions; Karlo attempts to remove a spirit in a lakeside property; Eric investigates a former hospital.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Ghost Cops
programme.desc: Jay and Marie investigate Arizona tunnels; the Tolfs investigate a former jail in Michigan; Shannon encounters spirits in a house.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Where Evil Hides
programme.desc: A family seeks help after their daughter is physically attacked by a demonic entity; a team is surprised by the intensity of paranormal activity at a historic inn; an investigator encounters the spirit of a long-dead musician in her former home.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Under Attack
programme.desc: Investigators are attacked by the ghost of a sadistic nurse at an abandoned hospital; a seemingly perfect home harbors an unwelcome guest; a father-daughter team is subjected to a torrent of abuse from the spirits of former inmates.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files
programme.sub-title: Nasty Surprises
programme.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team; a ghost hunter discovers that a remote island is alive with history; investigators unleash evil while investigating a historic home.
